title: fix: int4 model path for RTX 4090, https heartbeat for z-image
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A healthy heartbeat
gist.blurb: Gave our image generation nodes a quick checkup. Fixed a heartbeat connection issue and made sure our RTX 4090s are loading the right model weights.
gist.summary: Corrected the Z-Image heartbeat protocol to use HTTPS and updated the Nunchaku model path to use INT4 for RTX 4090 compatibility.
gist.impact: Image generation nodes will maintain stable connections without proxy errors and properly load models on Ada Lovelace architecture.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a doctor checking the heartbeat of a chunky retro computer (representing the GPU/RunPod node) with a stethoscope. A lime green glowing heart on the monitor.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny doctor's headlamp, using a stethoscope to check the heartbeat of a chunky retro computer monitor. The monitor screen displays a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixel heart. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny doctor's headlamp, using a stethoscope to check the heartbeat of a chunky retro computer monitor. The monitor screen displays a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixel heart. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
